summary: Jung-gu (downtown: 명동, 을지로, Namdaemun) hosts Seoul's historical commercial core with a small residential population. Narrow DPK hold (전현희 52.61 vs 윤희숙 47.38 in 중구·성동 갑) — downtown small-business plus commuter-professional mix.

issues.label: Small residential / commercial base
issues.description: Jung-gu has the smallest Seoul population; daytime commercial population dominates.

issues.label: Small-business + commuter-professional mix
issues.description: Myeongdong/Euljiro small-business community plus commuter professionals.

issues.label: Swing-adjacent national mood
issues.description: Narrow margin makes district responsive to national direction.
